text:
Once upon a time in a small town called Cedarwick, there lived a lonely little cat named Felice. Felice had the softest fur and the biggest greenest eyes. She had never left her window perch on the front porch, often watching the world go by.

It was a hot summer day. The sun blazed down, and nobody seemed to be doing much. That’s when Felice hatched a plan. She would go on an adventure into town. This was no ordinary adventure. Felice had heard tales of an old, mysterious bookstore just outside the town limits. Its owner said the books there belonged to legends, containing everything you ever wanted to learn about anything.

With a little courage, Felice set out. Her footsteps silent on the gravel path. As she reached the bookstore, its towering door stood open. In the gloomy interior stood a stout old woman with spectacles perched on the ends of her nose. She glanced up sharply when Felice entered.

“
